SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.storage

Class NIndex

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.storage.NIndex
public class NIndex extends Object
Represents an integer-based index with operations for arithmetic manipulation and comparison against various types of numeric inputs. Used for implementing the variables used only as indexes, i.e., COBOL clause INDEXED BY.

This class provides methods to perform addition, subtraction, and comparison with other integers, BigDecimal, AbstractNNumeric instances, and NIndex objects. It also includes utility methods to increment, decrement, and directly set or retrieve the value of the index.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NIndex()
    Creates a new instance of the NIndex class with its value initialized to a default state.
    NIndex(int value)
    Constructs an instance of the NIndex class with the specified integer value.

    Compares the specified integer value with the value of this NIndex instance to determine if the current value is greater.

  • Constructor Details

    • NIndex

      public NIndex()
      Creates a new instance of the NIndex class with its value initialized to a default state.

    • NIndex

      public NIndex(int value)
      Constructs an instance of the NIndex class with the specified integer value.
      Parameters:
      value - the integer value to initialize the NIndex object with

  • Method Details

    • initial

      public NIndex initial(int value)
      Reinitializes the value of the current NIndex instance with the specified integer value.
      Parameters:
      value - the integer value to set for the NIndex object
      Returns:
      the current NIndex instance with the updated value

    • getInt

      public int getInt()
      Retrieves the integer value associated with the current instance of the NIndex class.
      Returns:
      the integer value of this NIndex instance

    • increment

      public void increment()
      Increments the value of the current NIndex instance by 1.

    • decrement

      public void decrement()
      Decreases the integer value of the current NIndex instance by 1.

    • add

      public void add(int value)
      Adds the specified integer value to the current value of this NIndex instance.
      Parameters:
      value - the integer value to be added to the current value

    • add

      public void add(BigDecimal value)
      Adds the specified BigDecimal value to the current value of this NIndex instance. The BigDecimal value is converted to its integer representation before being added.
      Parameters:
      value - the BigDecimal value to be added to the current value

    • add

      public void add(AbstractNNumeric value)
      Adds the specified AbstractNNumeric value to the current value of this NIndex instance. The value is converted to its integer representation before being added.
      Parameters:
      value - the AbstractNNumeric value to be added to the current value

    • add

      public void add(NIndex value)
      Adds the value of the specified NIndex instance to the current NIndex instance.
      Parameters:
      value - the NIndex instance whose integer value is to be added to the current value

    • subtract

      public void subtract(int value)
      Subtracts the specified integer value from the current value of this NIndex instance.
      Parameters:
      value - the integer value to be subtracted from the current value

    • subtract

      public void subtract(BigDecimal value)
      Subtracts the specified BigDecimal value from the current value of this NIndex instance. The BigDecimal value is converted to its integer representation before being subtracted.
      Parameters:
      value - the BigDecimal value to be subtracted from the current value

    • subtract

      public void subtract(AbstractNNumeric value)
      Subtracts the integer value of the specified AbstractNNumeric object from the current value of this NIndex instance.
      Parameters:
      value - the AbstractNNumeric object whose integer representation is to be subtracted from the current value

    • subtract

      public void subtract(NIndex value)
      Subtracts the integer value of the specified NIndex instance from the current value of this NIndex instance.
      Parameters:
      value - the NIndex instance whose integer value is to be subtracted from the current value

    • equals

      public boolean equals(int value)
      Compares the specified integer value with the value of this NIndex instance for equality.
      Parameters:
      value - the integer value to be compared with the value of this NIndex instance
      Returns:
      true if the specified value is equal to the value of this instance; false otherwise

    • equals

      public boolean equals(BigDecimal value)
      Compares the current instance of NIndex with the specified BigDecimal value for equality. The equality check is performed by comparing the integer value of the current instance with the integer representation of the provided BigDecimal value.
      Parameters:
      value - the BigDecimal value to compare with the current NIndex instance
      Returns:
      true if the integer value of the current NIndex instance equals the integer representation of the provided BigDecimal value; false otherwise

    • equals

      public boolean equals(AbstractNNumeric value)
      Compares the current instance of NIndex with the specified AbstractNNumeric value for equality. The equality check is performed by comparing the integer value of the current instance with the integer representation of the provided AbstractNNumeric value.
      Parameters:
      value - the AbstractNNumeric value to compare with the current NIndex instance
      Returns:
      true if the integer value of the current NIndex instance equals the integer representation of the provided AbstractNNumeric value; false otherwise

    • equals

      public boolean equals(NIndex value)
      Compares this NIndex instance with the specified NIndex instance for equality. The equality check is performed by comparing the integer values of the two NIndex instances.
      Parameters:
      value - the NIndex instance to compare with the current NIndex instance
      Returns:
      true if the integer value of the specified NIndex instance is equal to the current instance's value; false otherwise

    • greaterThan

      public boolean greaterThan(int value)
      Compares the specified integer value with the value of this NIndex instance to determine if the current value is greater.
      Parameters:
      value - the integer value to be compared with the value of this NIndex instance
      Returns:
      true if the current value of this NIndex instance is greater than the specified value; false otherwise

    • greaterThan

      public boolean greaterThan(BigDecimal value)
      Compares the value of this NIndex instance with the specified BigDecimal value to determine if the current value is greater.
      Parameters:
      value - the BigDecimal value to be compared with the value of this NIndex instance
      Returns:
      true if the current value of this NIndex instance is greater than the integer representation of the specified BigDecimal value; false otherwise

    • greaterThan

      public boolean greaterThan(AbstractNNumeric value)
      Compares the integer value of this NIndex instance with the specified AbstractNNumeric value to determine if the current value is greater.
      Parameters:
      value - the AbstractNNumeric value to compare with the current NIndex instance
      Returns:
      true if the integer value of this NIndex instance is greater than the integer representation of the specified AbstractNNumeric value; false otherwise

    • greaterThan

      public boolean greaterThan(NIndex value)
      Compares the value of this NIndex instance with the specified NIndex instance to determine if the current value is greater.
      Parameters:
      value - the NIndex instance to compare with the current instance
      Returns:
      true if the current value of this NIndex instance is greater than the value of the specified NIndex instance; false otherwise

    • greaterEqualThan

      public boolean greaterEqualThan(int value)
      Compares the given value with the current object's value and determines if the current object's value is greater than or equal to the given value.
      Parameters:
      value - the integer to compare against the current object's value
      Returns:
      true if the current object's value is greater than or equal to the given value, false otherwise

    • greaterEqualThan

      public boolean greaterEqualThan(BigDecimal value)
      Compares the current object's value with the specified BigDecimal value and checks if it is greater than or equal to the given here.
      Parameters:
      value - the BigDecimal value to compare with the current object's value
      Returns:
      true if the current object's value is greater than or equal to the provided value; false otherwise

    • greaterEqualThan

      public boolean greaterEqualThan(AbstractNNumeric value)
      Compares the current object's numeric value with the specified value to determine if it is greater than or equal to the given value.
      Parameters:
      value - the AbstractNNumeric object to compare against
      Returns:
      true if the current object's value is greater than or equal to the specified value, false otherwise

    • greaterEqualThan

      public boolean greaterEqualThan(NIndex value)
      Compares the current object's value with the provided NIndex value to check if it is greater than or equal to it.
      Parameters:
      value - the NIndex object whose integer value is to be compared with the current object's value
      Returns:
      true if the current object's value is greater than or equal to the value of the provided NIndex, false otherwise

      public boolean lessThan(int value)
      Compares the specified value with the instance's value to determine if it is less.
      Parameters:
      value - the integer value to compare against the instance's value
      Returns:
      true if the instance's value is less than the specified value, false otherwise

      Compares the current object's value with the provided BigDecimal value to determine if it is less.
      Parameters:
      value - the BigDecimal value to compare against
      Returns:
      true if the current object's value is less than the given value, false otherwise

      Compares the current object's numerical value with the given value to determine if it is less.
      Parameters:
      value - the AbstractNNumeric object whose value is to be compared
      Returns:
      true if the current object's value is less than the provided value, false otherwise

      public boolean lessThan(NIndex value)
      Compares the current object's value with the specified NIndex value to determine if it is less.
      Parameters:
      value - the NIndex object whose value is to be compared
      Returns:
      true if the current object's value is less than the specified NIndex value, false otherwise

      public boolean lessEqualThan(int value)
      Compares the instance's value to the specified value to determine if it is less than or equal to the given value.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to be compared with the instance's value
      Returns:
      true if the instance's value is less than or equal to the given value, otherwise false

    • lessEqualThan

      public boolean lessEqualThan(BigDecimal value)
      Compares the instance's value to the specified BigDecimal value to check if it is less than or equal to it.
      Parameters:
      value - the BigDecimal value to compare against
      Returns:
      true if the instance's value is less than or equal to the specified value, false otherwise

    • lessEqualThan

      public boolean lessEqualThan(AbstractNNumeric value)
      Compares the current object's numeric value with the given numeric value to determine if it is less than or equal to the provided value.
      Parameters:
      value - the numeric value to compare against, represented as an AbstractNNumeric object
      Returns:
      true if the current object's value is less than or equal to the provided value, false otherwise

    • lessEqualThan

      public boolean lessEqualThan(NIndex value)
      Checks if the current object's value is less than or equal to the provided value.
      Parameters:
      value - The NIndex object to compare against.
      Returns:
      true if the current object's value is less than or equal to the value of the provided NIndex object, false otherwise.

    • setValue

      public void setValue(int value)
      Sets the value of the object.
      Parameters:
      value - the new value to set

    • setValue

      public void setValue(BigDecimal value)
      Sets the value after converting it to an integer.
      Parameters:
      value - the BigDecimal value to be set, which will be converted to an integer

    • setValue

      public void setValue(AbstractNNumeric value)
      Sets the integer value from the specified AbstractNNumeric instance.
      Parameters:
      value - an instance of AbstractNNumeric from which the integer value is extracted and set

    • setValue

      public void setValue(NIndex value)
      Sets the provided NIndex value after retrieving its integer representation.
      Parameters:
      value - the NIndex object whose integer value is to be set
